---
title: "IFCD0210 Sprint Backlog"
categories: [ifcd0210, backlog]
toc: true
number-sections: false
format:
  html
filters:
   - lightbox
lightbox: true
---

<style>

.heatMap th { background:  #f4f4f4;}
tr:nth-child(3) {background-color: #f4f4f4;}
tr:nth-child(6) {background-color: #f4f4f4;}
th, td {
  padding: 8px;
  text-align: left;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
}

tr:hover {background-color:  #f4f4f4;}

</style>

![Sprint Backlog](/images/home/backlog.jpg){width="30%"}

<div class="heatMap">

::: {.column-page-right}

##  ``Sprint#22: Polymarket project II`` (May 2026)

| # | Day | Date | Topics |  Details Topics |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
| **#22** | 74 | 11/05/2026 | - Plan Sprint#22 </br></br> - SCRUM/Agile: </br> (1) Foundations, Pillars, Manifesto and practices </br> (2) Roles and Responsibilities </br> (3) Meetings and Cognition   </br></br> - <s>Code Challenge</s> </br></br>  - Spring, React, GraphQL Full Stack Project `Polymarket` </br> (1)  **Sprint Planning #3**  | - [Guide](/scrum/scrum-what-guide.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Pillars](https://albertprofe.dev/scrum/scrum-what-concepts.html#the-three-pillars-of-empiricism-scrum){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Foundations](https://albertprofe.dev/scrum/scrum-what-concepts.html#agile-manifesto-four-foundations){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Principles](https://albertprofe.dev/scrum/scrum-what-agile-manifesto.html){.external target='_blank'} </br></br> - [Official 2020 SCRUM Guide: Summary](/images/ifcd0210-26/docs/SCRUM-summary.qmd){.external target='_blank'}  </br></br> - [Hakathon](/images/ifcd0210-26/docs/Briefing_hackathon.pdf){.external target='_blank'} </br> ![](/images/ifcd0210-26/hakathon.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} |
|  | 75 | 12/05/2026 |    - Code Challenge: </br> (1) LAB#05: Implementing Zone Access Control Logic</br> (2) 4 approaches </br></br>   - Spring, React, GraphQL Full Stack Project `Polymarket` </br> (1) Understand the needs & features </br> (2) Create roles/teams </br> (3) Create rules/tools </br> (4) CD/CI for Back/Front/DB/Documentation </br> (5) Create requirements docs for `openCode` AI: `tech stack & architecture` </br> (6) Create implementation details </br> (7) **Sprint Executing #3** </br></br>   | - [Lab#05: NESTED if/else](/images/ifcd0210-26/docs/Lab05-AlgorithmIF.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br>  ![](/images/ifcd0210-26/nested-ifs.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} </br>- [flowchart: txt](/images/ifcd0210-26/docs/ZONE_ACCESS-flow.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br>|
|  |
|  | 76 | 14/05/2026 |  - Spring, React, GraphQL Full Stack Project `Polymarket` </br> (1) Understand the needs & features </br> (2) Create roles/teams </br> (3) Create rules/tools </br> (4) CD/CI for Back/Front/DB/Documentation  </br> (5) Create requirements docs for `openCode` AI: `tech stack & architecture` </br> (6) Create implementation details  </br> (7) Sprint Executing #3 </br> </br> - openCode Ai`  |  |
|  | 77 | 15/05/2026 | - MF03: Prova Pràctica and Prova Objectiva  |  |
|  |
|  | 78 | 18/05/2026 |  - Hackathon CIFO 2026  |  |
: Backlog Sprint#22 May 2026 {tbl-colwidths="[2,2,2,55,39]"}
:::

</div>

::: {.callout-note}
- `---------` <s>topic pending</s>
- `-` topic done in class
- `++` new topic not planned
:::
